name: Spores release cut
description: End-to-end workflow for cutting a new @tnezdev/spores version

nodes.label: Verify clean working tree
nodes.description: git status shows no uncommitted changes; on main; up to date with origin

nodes.label: Run full test suite
nodes.description: bun test — all green, no failures, no skipped suites

nodes.label: Verify zero production dependencies
nodes.description: package.json dependencies field is empty object

nodes.label: Pack dry run
nodes.description: npm pack --dry-run — scan contents for unwanted files

nodes.label: Bump version and write CHANGELOG
nodes.description: Edit package.json version per semver; append CHANGELOG entry; commit

nodes.label: Publish to npm
nodes.description: npm publish --access public — pause for Travis to run manually

nodes.label: Verify registry
nodes.description: npm view @tnezdev/spores version matches the tag just cut
